items.title: huggingface/transformers

items.cn_summary: 主流机器学习模型框架，支持文本视觉多模态。

items.title: bytedance/deer-flow
items.description: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.
items.cn_summary: 开源长周期超级智能体，支持研究、编码与创作。

items.title: Framer 3.0

items.cn_summary: Framer 3.0引入智能体与分支社区功能

items.title: Reinforcement Learning without Ground-Truth Solutions can Improve LLMs
items.description: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) for training LLMs typically rely on ground-truth answers to assign rewards, limiting their applicability to tasks where the ground-truth solution is unknown. We introduce a \textbf{R}anking-\textbf{i}nduced \textbf{VER}ifiable framework (RiVER) that trains LLMs on score-based optimization tasks without ground-truth solutions, using deterministic execution feedback as continuous-valued supervision. When applying group-relative RL to such conti
items.cn_summary: 引入排序诱导可验证框架，无需标准答案即可强化学习训练LLM。
